websiteBuilder.title: Design Your Own Site Yourself
websiteBuilder.description: With Website Builder, you'll be able to create a site unique to your brand yourself, with a drag-and-drop interface — no coding required. Currently in development.

items.question: How long does it take to launch a corporate website?
items.answer: It depends on scope. A small corporate site can usually go live within a few weeks; for multilingual and larger projects, we set a clear timeline together during the discovery call.

items.question: Why aren't prices listed on the site?
items.answer: Every project has a different scope, so a standard price list would be misleading. After a short discovery call, we prepare a clear, itemized quote tailored to your needs.

items.question: Who prepares the copy and visuals?
items.answer: You are the primary source of content; we guide the structure, hierarchy, and SEO. Content production support can be added to the scope separately if needed.

items.question: What happens after the site goes live?
items.answer: The site and its code belong to you. If you'd like, our maintenance, performance & SEO package covers updates, monitoring, and continuous improvement.

items.question: Can we make revisions during the design process?
items.answer: Yes. The process moves through staged approvals; we don't start development before the design is settled, so revisions happen at the right stage.

process.title: A clear process, a predictable delivery
process.subtitle: Every project follows the same discipline, but arrives at a distinct result.

hero.title: Distinctive design, built with engineering discipline
hero.subtitle: HIZIR Software builds corporate websites and digital solutions for businesses — and its own technology products.

story.title: We started with one question
story.body: Not every agency project needs to be built from scratch — but not every client deserves the same design either. HIZIR Software was founded to bring these two truths together in one system: a shared, solid engineering foundation, with a distinct design identity for every project. Every step we take today is built on that same foundation.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: Our goal isn't to sell every client the same design. It's to build a distinct identity and experience for every project, on top of one shared and solid engineering foundation. We pair a modern, minimal, premium design approach with a priority on SEO, performance, and long-term sustainability.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.body: We work toward a standard where thoughtfully designed, sustainable digital products — built to international standards — are within reach for businesses of any size.

values.title: The principles behind how we work

items.title: Shared infrastructure, distinct design
items.description: Every project is built on a solid, proven technical foundation with its own unique identity.

items.title: Performance and SEO first
items.description: Speed and search visibility aren't an afterthought — they're part of the design from day one.

items.title: Infrastructure built to grow
items.description: A multilingual, scalable architecture that doesn't need a rewrite as your business grows.

items.title: Long-term sustainability
items.description: Code is written with maintenance, growth, and future change in mind — not just today.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains which personal data HIZIR Software processes through this website, for what purpose, and how. Your personal data is processed in accordance with the Turkish Personal Data Protection Law (KVKK, Law No. 6698).

sections.heading: What data do we collect?
sections.body: When you fill in the contact form, your full name, email address, (optional) company name, and message are transmitted to us. The site has no membership or account system; no personal data is requested outside the form.

sections.heading: What do we use the data for?
sections.body: Information submitted through the form is used solely to respond to your inquiry, contact you, and prepare a quote. No marketing messages are sent without your explicit consent; your data is not sold or shared with third parties for marketing.

sections.heading: How is the data transmitted and stored?
sections.body: Form submissions reach us as email via an email delivery service and are kept for a reasonable period as part of our correspondence history. Your data is not retained longer unless legal obligations require it.

sections.heading: Cookies and analytics
sections.body: This site does not use tracking cookies. If visit statistics are collected, a cookieless analytics tool that does not gather personal data is preferred.

sections.heading: Your rights under KVKK
sections.body: Under Article 11 of KVKK, you have the right to learn whether your personal data is processed, to request information about it, and to request correction or deletion of your data.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: For all privacy-related questions and requests, you can reach us at iletisim@hizirsoftware.com.
